channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The War Over Prediction Markets Is Just Getting Started
item.description: Prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket are booming, and so is a fight among regulators, lawmakers, and advocates over their legality.

item.title: Gmail Is Killing POP and Gmailify Access. Here's What It Means for You
item.description: If you have multiple email accounts, your Gmail setup may soon need some reorganizing.

item.title: Google’s new Gemini Pro model has record benchmark scores — again
item.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro promises a Google LLM capable of handling more complex forms of work.

item.title: General Catalyst commits $5B to India over five years
item.description: The pledge marks a sharp jump from General Catalyst's earlier $500 million–$1 billion India earmark.

item.title: The Olympics and Politics Are More Intertwined Than Ever. Maybe That’s a Good Thing
item.description: The Olympics often provide a moment of unity and celebration during times of geopolitical uncertainty. But blind nationalism didn’t win at the 2026 Wi...

item.title: Best Coffee Grinders For Espresso and Drip, Machine-Tested (2026)
item.description: We used particle size analysis and real-world testing to find the best conical burr, flat burr, and blade grinders for every budget and style of coffe...

item.title: Ali Partovi’s Neo looks to upend the accelerator model with low-dilution terms
item.description: Neo's new Residency program invests $750,000 in an uncapped SAFE for startups and provides a $40,000 no-strings-attached grant for college students.

item.title: Nvidia deepens early-stage push into India’s AI startup ecosystem
item.description: Nvidia is working with investors, nonprofits, and venture firms to build earlier ties with India's fast-growing AI founder ecosystem.

item.title: Leading US Research Lab Appears to Be Squeezing Out Foreign Scientists
item.description: House Democrats are demanding answers from the National Institute of Standards and Technology and urging it to halt rumored changes they say could und...

item.title: FBI says ATM ‘jackpotting’ attacks are on the rise, and netting hackers millions in stolen cash
item.description: The FBI says hacks that trick ATMs into spitting out cash on demand are rising, with hundreds of attacks in the past year alone netting hackers millio...
